skipped.reason: All 182 non-draft open PRs already have human review activity (reviews or comments present). 46 additional PRs were drafts and excluded.

style_guide: Commit subject format: `<area>: <SubArea>: Description` — description must start with a capital letter (e.g. `frontend: NodeDetails: Fix drain status polling leak`, `backend: auth: Bound FuzzSanitizeClusterName input`).
Keep commit subject under 72 characters (soft limit).
Do NOT include `Fixes #NN`, `closes #NN`, or similar auto-close keywords in commit messages.
Approval style is warm and brief — `🎉 thanks!` is the standard merge acknowledgment from maintainers.
Reviewer @illume is the primary maintainer and is very responsive; requests CHANGES_REQUESTED for commit guideline violations before approving.
copilot-pull-request-reviewer[bot] auto-reviews all PRs; its reviews count as review activity.
PRs must fix a real bug, add a feature, or address a clear maintenance need — refactors without justification are not accepted.
Frontend: TypeScript/React; fix exhaustive-deps lint violations rather than suppressing them with eslint-disable.
Backend: Go — use comma-ok type assertions rather than unsafe panicking assertions; structured logging with slog.
Tests required for both frontend (Vitest) and backend (Go test) changes that touch logic.
